visual_mood: Headline split by the product -- top half of text above, bottom half below, sunglasses in the middle

product.placement: The sunglasses sit horizontally in the middle of the frame, splitting the headline in two. Worn on a person's face -- the person's eyes and nose bridge visible, sunglasses naturally on face between the two text halves.
product.instruction: Only ONE pair matching the reference. Real matte sunglasses worn naturally on a real face. The person and product sandwich between the split text.

prompt: A portrait photograph of a Filipino male wearing ONE pair of Rasta Brown sunglasses from DuberyMNL -- real matte sunglasses matching the reference image, naturally on face. Solid warm dark red background. Massive white bold italic text split by the subject: 'SEE' above the person's head and 'CLEAR.' below the chin, both in the typeface from the font reference. The person wearing the sunglasses fills the space between the two text halves, creating a sandwich effect. Everything lit by the same soft studio light. Small 'DUBERY POLARIZED' at bottom. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio, high contrast.
